How to Apply Your
Estrogen Patch
Patient Instruction Sheet
Patch Placement Guide

Apply here — lower abdomen or upper buttock. Rotate spots; wait 1 week before reusing same area.

Avoid — breasts, waistline, skin folds, irritated or broken skin, tattoos.

Apply
twice weekly
Mon
Thu
or
Tue
Fri
or
Wed
Sat
Step-by-Step Instructions
  1. 1
    Apply to a clean, dry, hair-free area of the lower stomach or upper buttock — free of powder, oil, or lotion.
  2. 2
    Press firmly with your hand for 10 seconds.
  3. 3
    Do not apply on the breast, skin folds, waistline, or irritated/broken skin.
  4. 4
    Wear continuously until your next change day. Avoid prolonged sun exposure on the patch.
  5. 5
    Always move to a different area when applying a new patch. Wait at least 1 week before reusing the same spot.
  6. 6
    You may bathe, shower, or swim — the patch is water-safe.
  7. 7
    If patch falls off, reapply to a different spot. If it won't stick, use a new patch and keep your original schedule.

If you also take Progesterone (oral micronized progesterone / Prometrium):

Take it 30 minutes before bedtime to minimize side effects and support restful sleep.

Disposing of a used patch

Fold sticky-side in, place in a child-proof container, and trash — away from children and pets. Do not flush.
